nasb.text: Therefore the Lord heard and was full of wrath; And a fire was kindled against Jacob And anger also mounted against Israel,

esv.text: Therefore, when the Lord heard, he was full of wrath; a fire was kindled against Jacob; his anger rose against Israel,

cnv.text: 因此耶和華聽見了，就大怒； 有烈火在雅各燒起， 有怒氣向以色列發作。

ccb.text: 耶和华听后大怒， 祂的怒火烧向雅各， 祂的怒气撒向以色列。

csbs.text: 耶和华听了就动怒， 烈火向雅各燃起， 怒气也向以色列上腾；
